title: Hane no Niwa · the garden of feathers
notes: Entries reveal when their token lands in GauntletState.lore_tokens_revealed (hosts emit on finished; conditional tokens per manifest). Schema matches pirate_summer/scrapbook.json.

entries.title: The garden, tended
entries.blurb: Letters arrived. Feathers fell. You kept what deserved keeping and let the rest go on the wind, which is the entire discipline the garden teaches.

entries.title: The blank letter
entries.blurb: The gold feather came with a letter that says nothing, which is to say everything. In Fey Faire, Moth has a line about this. Moth is not supposed to know.

entries.title: The ninth seat
entries.blurb: Having sat everywhere there is to sit: the top step, facing down the hill, the way the foxes face. The shrine is not for the shrine.
